case_title: BEFIKADU DUBALE VS. GLENN HOLSCLAW et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF AUG-03-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-03-2012.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-05-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLSCLAW, GLENN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUBALE, BEFIKADU JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MICHAEL ELLIS FREEDMAN.
ARBITRATOR DAVID G. LEACH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-03-2012 THROUGH NOV-01-2012.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-23-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-05-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. THE APR-02-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR ESTA SCHWARTZ SWIG APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-04-2012 THROUGH AUG-02-2012.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-02-2012.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUBALE, BEFIKADU SERVED NOV-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLSCLAW, GLENN
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CHARLES ALLAN DAVIS.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUBALE, BEFIKADU AS TO DEFENDANT HOLSCLAW, GLENN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-02-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-17-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CHARLES ALLAN DAVIS.
